message:
refactor(scripts,tests): simplify E2E test orchestration and clean up code hygiene

E2E Test Infrastructure (-530 lines net):
  - run_all_e2e.sh: remove cross-suite manifest generation (SCENARIO_COVERAGE_MAP_FILE,
    CROSS_SUITE_MANIFEST_FILE) that duplicated MANIFEST_NDJSON data
  - run_phase6_e2e.sh: consolidate artifact paths, remove ARTIFACT_DIR creation,
    TEST_SEED/TEST_LOG_LEVEL exports, and suite_results.ndjson tracking
  - test_cancel_attribution.sh: streamlined artifact paths and result tracking
  - test_combinators.sh: reduced boilerplate, consolidated result collection
  - test_database_e2e.sh: removed redundant setup/teardown tracking
  - test_distributed_e2e.sh: removed redundant manifest generation
  - test_h2_security_e2e.sh: simplified artifact management
  - test_net_hardening_e2e.sh: consolidated artifact paths to timestamp pattern
  - test_redis_e2e.sh: removed redundant setup tracking
  - test_scheduler_wakeup_e2e.sh: simplified artifact and result collection
  - test_transport_e2e.sh: removed redundant manifest entries

Single source of truth is now MANIFEST_NDJSON + per-suite summary files.
Same failure diagnostics and replay commands, faster orchestration.

Code Hygiene:
  - src/decoding.rs: remove unused import gf256_addmul_slice, dead variable
    base_rows, expand inline if-else for readability
  - src/cancel/symbol_cancel.rs: trailing whitespace cleanup
  - tests/common/mod.rs: alphabetical import reordering
  - tests/phase0_verification.rs: alphabetical import reordering
  - tests/runtime_e2e.rs: minor test update
  - benches/methodology_baselines.rs: import reordering + benchmark alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
